name: phi-coordinator
label: PHI Coordinator
description: Finalizes PHI review tags by reading completed reader-task form responses.
author: NACC

dry_run.description: Log intended changes without applying them

phi_protocol_label.description: Label of the reader-task protocols whose completed tasks to process

answer_key.description: Key in the form response_data holding the yes/no answer

ack_key.description: Key in the form response_data for the deletion-acknowledgment checkbox that must be checked before a 'yes' answer is confirmed; empty disables the requirement

found_tag.description: Tag marking a file with detected PHI awaiting review; removed once resolved

confirmed_tag.description: Tag added to the file when the reviewer confirms PHI is present

not_found_tag.description: Tag added to the file when the reviewer reports no PHI

coordinated_tag.description: Marker tag added to a reader task once processed, excluding it from future runs

reset_on_missing_data.description: If a completed task has no usable answer, reset it to Todo and clear its response
